fields.name: settlement_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this funds settlement batch from Accounts to Investments

fields.name: settlement_date
fields.description: The business date on which the settlement was executed

fields.name: currency
fields.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all amounts in this settlement

fields.name: total_amount
fields.description: Total monetary value of all fund transfers in this settlement batch

fields.name: settlement_status
fields.description: Current processing state of the settlement

fields.name: settlements
fields.description: Individual fund transfer transactions comprising this settlement batch

children.name: fund_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the investment fund receiving the transfer

children.name: fund_name
children.description: Human-readable name of the investment fund

children.name: transaction_type
children.description: Classification of the fund movement direction

children.name: amount
children.description: Monetary value of this individual fund transfer in the settlement currency

children.name: reference
children.description: Accounts system reference code linking this transfer to the originating transaction

children.name: timestamp
children.description: Precise moment when this individual fund transfer was processed

children.name: verified
children.description: Flag indicating whether this transfer has passed validation checks

fields.name: created_by
fields.description: System or process identifier that generated this settlement record

fields.name: approved_by
fields.description: Email address of the authorized person who approved this settlement

fields.name: approval_timestamp
fields.description: Precise moment when the settlement was approved by the authorized approver

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Optional free-text commentary describing the purpose or context of this settlement
